description_long: This object is a wooden Viking-style longship with a narrow, elongated hull and upward-curving bow and stern. Along both sides, there are round shields with green and white patterns, attached just above the waterline. The deck is open, with visible wooden planks and a central mast supporting a vertically striped sail in green and white. Multiple oars extend from both sides, indicating manual rowing as a primary means of propulsion. The ship also features a single black flag at the top of the mast and a small green pennant.
description: A wooden Viking longship with a striped sail, round shields along the sides, and multiple oars for rowing.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the ship, the shields, and the oars extending from both sides.
description_view_1: Front view highlighting the pointed bow, the arrangement of oars, and the striped sail facing forward.
description_view_2: Opposite side view, similar to view 0, with shields and oars visible along the hull.
description_view_3: Rear view showing the stern, the oars, and the back of the sail, with the flag and pennant visible at the mast top.
